title: Read acceptance criteria and plan
notes: Read and analyze acceptance-criteria.json and .rhino-plan.md to understand the requirements.

title: Map ACs to tests
notes: Map each acceptance criterion to existing or new tests.

title: Read existing tests and factories
notes: Examine existing tests, factories, and helpers in the codebase.

title: Write feature and isolation tests
notes: Write comprehensive integration/feature tests for all ACs, including isolation and Extras.

title: Run tests and fix failures
notes: Run the test suite and iterate on fixing any failures.

title: Update AC status to tested
notes: Update the status of each AC in acceptance-criteria.json to 'tested'.

title: Verify coverage and finish
notes: Perform a final verification of test coverage and complete the stage.
